title: Secrets Compliance Audit
description: Pending cross-check of workspace configuration summary against internal secret-handling policy SECRET-001. Update this task with the final compliance assessment (e.g., compliant, non‑compliant) and any recommended remediations.

title: Update API Gateway TLS Certificates
description: Renew and deploy TLS certificates for api‑gateway‑prod and api‑gateway‑staging before expiration on 2025‑11‑15. Coordinate with the networking team for the maintenance window.

title: Refactor User Service Logging Middleware
description: Implement structured logging in the user service middleware layer to improve traceability across the authentication and authorization flows. Target integration sprint 42.

title: Q4 Access Review – Database Credentials
description: Perform quarterly access review for all production database credentials and service accounts. Verify least‑privilege principle and remove any stale permissions. Document findings in the security hub.
